examples: Life will never be the flower Withers.
Hence Venus Withers under a runaway greenhouse effect.
After the juice is thus drawn out, the tree Withers and dies.
When you speak low our summer day withers away too soon, all too soon.
Revolutionary (Pletcher, Javier Castellano): Withers winner breezed 4 furlongs in 49.85 Sunday at Palm Meadows.
